mapper.sql: t1.SUBJECT_NUM, t1.SYS_APPLICATION_ID, t1.SUBJECT_PRICE, t1.DELIVER_DATE, t1.SPECS_TYPE, t1.DATA_SOURCE, t1.JT_ID, t1.ERROR_INFO, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.IS_TRANS, t1.IS_OCCUPY, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.SECRET_LEVEL, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.BUSINESS_ID, t1.UNIT, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.OPERATION_TYPE, t1.INCRE_DECRE_RATE, t1.SUBJECT_NAME, t1.ORG_CODE, t1.SUBJECT_TOTAL_AMOUNT, t1.TAX_RATE, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.TASK_NO, t1.TASK_TYPE, t1.PLAN_TYPE
mapper.insert:
insert into CMJT_SUBJECT_BASE
SUBJECT_NUM,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID,
SUBJECT_PRICE,
DELIVER_DATE,
SPECS_TYPE,
DATA_SOURCE,
JT_ID,
ERROR_INFO,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
IS_TRANS,
IS_OCCUPY,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
SECRET_LEVEL,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
BUSINESS_ID,
UNIT,
CREATION_DATE,
OPERATION_TYPE,
INCRE_DECRE_RATE,
SUBJECT_NAME,
ORG_CODE,
SUBJECT_TOTAL_AMOUNT,
TAX_RATE,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
TASK_NO,
TASK_TYPE,
PLAN_TYPE,
#{subjectNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{subjectPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{deliverDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{specsType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{dataSource,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{jtId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{errorInfo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{isTrans,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{isOccupy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{businessId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{unit,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{increDecreRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{subjectName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{subjectTotalAmount,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{taxRate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{taskNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{taskType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{planType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into CMJT_SUBJECT_BASE( SUBJECT_NUM , SYS_APPLICATION_ID , SUBJECT_PRICE , DELIVER_DATE , SPECS_TYPE , DATA_SOURCE , JT_ID , ERROR_INFO , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , IS_TRANS , IS_OCCUPY , ID , CREATED_DEPT , SECRET_LEVEL , LAST_UPDATE_IP , CREATED_BY , LAST_UPDATED_BY , BUSINESS_ID , UNIT , CREATION_DATE , OPERATION_TYPE , INCRE_DECRE_RATE , SUBJECT_NAME , ORG_CODE , SUBJECT_TOTAL_AMOUNT , TAX_RATE , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY , TASK_NO, TASK_TYPE, PLAN_TYPE )
select #{item.subjectNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.subjectPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.deliverDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.specsType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.dataSource,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.jtId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.errorInfo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.isTrans,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.isOccupy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.businessId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.unit,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.increDecreRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.subjectName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.subjectTotalAmount,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.taxRate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.taskNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.taskType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.planType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update CMJT_SUBJECT_BASE
SUBJECT_NUM = #{subjectNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SUBJECT_PRICE = #{subjectPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
DELIVER_DATE = #{deliverDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SPECS_TYPE = #{specsType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
DATA_SOURCE = #{dataSource,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
JT_ID = #{jtId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ERROR_INFO = #{errorInfo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
IS_TRANS = #{isTrans,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
IS_OCCUPY = #{isOccupy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
UNIT = #{unit,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
OPERATION_TYPE = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
INCRE_DECRE_RATE = #{increDecreRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
SUBJECT_NAME = #{subjectName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_CODE = #{orgCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SUBJECT_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{subjectTotalAmount,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
TAX_RATE = #{taxRate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TASK_NO = #{taskNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TASK_TYPE = #{taskType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
PLAN_TYPE = #{planType,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update CMJT_SUBJECT_BASE set SUBJECT_NUM = #{subjectNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SUBJECT_PRICE = #{subjectPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , DELIVER_DATE = #{deliverDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SPECS_TYPE = #{specsType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_SOURCE = #{dataSource,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JT_ID = #{jtId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ERROR_INFO = #{errorInfo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , IS_TRANS = #{isTrans,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , IS_OCCUPY = #{isOccupy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UNIT = #{unit,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , OPERATION_TYPE = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INCRE_DECRE_RATE = #{increDecreRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , SUBJECT_NAME = #{subjectName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_CODE = #{orgCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SUBJECT_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{subjectTotalAmount,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , TAX_RATE = #{taxRate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TASK_TYPE = #{item.taskType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TASK_NO = #{item.taskNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PLAN_TYPE = #{planType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update CMJT_SUBJECT_BASE set SUBJECT_NUM = #{item.subjectNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{item.sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SUBJECT_PRICE = #{item.subjectPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , DELIVER_DATE = #{item.deliverDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SPECS_TYPE = #{item.specsType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DATA_SOURCE = #{item.dataSource,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JT_ID = #{item.jtId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ERROR_INFO = #{item.errorInfo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , IS_TRANS = #{item.isTrans,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , IS_OCCUPY = #{item.isOccupy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SECRET_LEVEL = #{item.secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BUSINESS_ID = #{item.businessId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , UNIT = #{item.unit,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , OPERATION_TYPE = #{item.operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INCRE_DECRE_RATE = #{item.increDecreRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , SUBJECT_NAME = #{item.subjectName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_CODE = #{item.orgCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SUBJECT_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{item.subjectTotalAmount,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , TAX_RATE = #{item.taxRate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TASK_TYPE = #{item.taskType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TASK_NO = #{item.taskNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PLAN_TYPE = #{item.planType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where DATA_SOURCE = #{item.dataSource} and BUSINESS_ID = #{item.businessId} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.update:
update CMJT_SUBJECT_BASE
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SYS_APPLICATION_ID = #{sysApplicationId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SUBJECT_NAME = #{subjectName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SUBJECT_NUM = #{subjectNum,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
SUBJECT_PRICE = #{subjectPrice,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
SUBJECT_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{subjectTotalAmount,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
DELIVER_DATE = #{deliverDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
INCRE_DECRE_RATE = #{increDecreRate,jdbcType = DECIMAL} ,
PLAN_TYPE = #{planType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SPECS_TYPE = #{specsType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TAX_RATE = #{taxRate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
UNIT = #{unit,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
ORG_CODE = #{orgCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
IS_OCCUPY = #{isOccupy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} ,
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
SECRET_LEVEL = #{secretLevel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
VERSION = version+1 ,
DATA_SOURCE = #{dataSource,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
IS_TRANS = #{isTrans,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
OPERATION_TYPE = #{operationType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TASK_NO = #{taskNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
TASK_TYPE = #{taskType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} ,
JT_ID = #{jtId,jdbcType = VARCHAR}
where DATA_SOURCE = #{dataSource} and BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId}
mapper.delete: delete from CMJT_SUBJECT_BASE where DATA_SOURCE = #{dataSource} And BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId}
